frontmatter.title: My thoughts on cross-platform/device apps
frontmatter.description: This is a writing, where I share my experiences, learnings and my views on cross platform application development now-a-days.

frontmatter.title: VCE Results Web-app
frontmatter.description: A web application which can be used as an alternative source to VCE Results site.

frontmatter.title: React Native Tips Repo
frontmatter.description: A repository where I keep adding tips for React Native.

frontmatter.title: Teachers and Mentors
frontmatter.description: A writing dedicated to all the teachers and mentors who are reason for what I am today. :D

frontmatter.title: Well Knitted Ecosystem
frontmatter.description: My love for ecosystems.

frontmatter.title: Quiz Writer Bot
frontmatter.description: A mini-project to build a bot for myself to write MCQ based tests for me.

frontmatter.title: FixedPointMathLib vs ABDKMath64x64 - What should you use?
frontmatter.description: An article about which library to pick for fractional arithmetic in Solidity.

frontmatter.title: A bot that saved a lot of time for me.
frontmatter.description: A article about how and why I built a bot for myself, which write MCQ based tests for me.

frontmatter.title: My Opinion on AI and LLMs
frontmatter.description: A brief opinion on what AI and LLMs are doing and how would they effect us.

frontmatter.title: Mastering ERC721 Enumerable
frontmatter.description: An article about ERC721Enumerable and how is it helpful and different from base ERC721 standard.

frontmatter.title: Mastering Fixed Point Arithmetic in Solidity
frontmatter.description: An article that explores on why we would need a library to handle fixed point arithmetic in Solidity.

frontmatter.title: Building 'Mini-Terminal' for my portfolio
frontmatter.description: The motivation and story behind why and how I built 'Mini-Terminal'

frontmatter.title: Solving the Wordle Solver
frontmatter.description: A CLI algo to solve wordle puzzles effortlessly

frontmatter.title: Wear OS Watch Faces
frontmatter.description: A fun experiment building custom watch faces for my Fossil Gen 5 Wear OS watch, just to see what the APIs let you do.

frontmatter.title: Self-Hosted Backup Tools
frontmatter.description: A few small tools I built while moving my own data off the cloud and onto my home NAS, shared for anyone else backing up Google and Snapchat exports.

frontmatter.title: sshmux
frontmatter.description: A tiny tool that gives me persistent SSH sessions using tmux, so my connections to remote machines survive drops and long-running jobs keep going.

frontmatter.title: Scotland Yard Companion
frontmatter.description: A web companion for the board game Scotland Yard that replaces the error-prone shared notepad and removes trust issues around Mr. X's hidden moves.

frontmatter.title: Rapid Roll Reloaded
frontmatter.description: A Unity remake of the classic Nokia 'Rapid Roll' arcade game, built to run on any device with keyboard, touch, and gyroscope controls, and shipped to the Play Store.

frontmatter.title: PocketBase on Railway
frontmatter.description: A Dockerized PocketBase with a one-click 'Deploy on Railway' template, one of my simplest yet most-used open-source repos.

frontmatter.title: C++ Speed in Node.js (N-API)
frontmatter.description: A tech talk and template exploring how to call fast C++ from Node.js through N-API, so time-sensitive work runs at native speed while keeping Node's event loop.

frontmatter.title: Market Maker Game
frontmatter.description: A multiplayer stock-trading game I designed as a board game and then turned into a real-time web app.

frontmatter.title: Match 4 Cards
frontmatter.description: A browser card game built in React with Firebase, a quick, fun match game to play with friends.

frontmatter.title: gist-pdf
frontmatter.description: A tool I built to turn GitHub Gists into clean PDFs, then packaged it properly for Homebrew, APT, Cargo, and Docker.

frontmatter.title: fetch-cookie
frontmatter.description: An open-source fix I needed for my own work: making fetch-cookie not throw the whole request away when setting a cookie fails.

frontmatter.title: ESC/POS Printer Server
frontmatter.description: A small server that lets me print to a USB thermal printer straight from the browser, working around all the driver and browser headaches.

frontmatter.title: Content Generation Harness
frontmatter.description: A multi-agent harness I built that turns a single topic into a finished short-form educational video, and cut my video-making time by about 10x.

frontmatter.title: django-forms-builder (my first PR)
frontmatter.description: My very first open-source contribution: a bug-fix PR to a Django forms package I was using for a college project.

frontmatter.title: Catan Map Generator
frontmatter.description: A Catan board generator I built for my own game nights, complete with a face-down 'surprise mode' my group invented.

frontmatter.title: Coderplex Donation Page
frontmatter.description: My first open-source contribution that actually shipped, a donation page for the Coderplex Foundation, and where I learned the git, PR, and open-source-etiquette workflow.

frontmatter.title: gh-contrib
frontmatter.description: An open-source fix I made to a GitHub CLI extension that renders your contribution graph in the terminal, so it shows the correct data over a proper sliding one-year window.

frontmatter.title: Teaching & Tutorial Repos
frontmatter.description: A collection of hands-on tutorial and course repos I built for my guest lectures and the Full-Stack Development course I teach, so students have clean, runnable material to learn from.

frontmatter.title: Fibbozle
frontmatter.description: A console game in C, like 2048 but the tiles merge along the Fibonacci series instead of doubling. My first proper terminal project in C.

frontmatter.title: ARHunt
frontmatter.description: An augmented-reality treasure hunt we built for our college tech fest, where scanning a character reveals a 3D model that hints at your next stop.

frontmatter.title: Chill Remote
frontmatter.description: A web app and browser extension that turn my phone into a remote for whatever is playing on my screen, so I can seek, play, and pause from the couch.
